chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 456 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 21.02.2018. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Jangu Khan Special Prosecutor NAB -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instruction of petitioner does not press this constitutional petition, which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
